summary: The notebook currently contains one course note on gradient descent and one paper-reading note on the Transformer, covering machine-learning fundamentals and deep-learning architectures.

areas.label: Machine Learning
areas.coverage: A single foundational note covering gradient descent, the update rule, learning-rate intuition, and a worked quadratic example.
areas.gap: The ml-foundations course has only its first note; subsequent topics like momentum, Adam, and convex optimization basics are not yet present.

areas.label: Deep Learning
areas.coverage: One structured reading note on the Transformer, including scaled dot-product attention, multi-head attention, and WMT 2014 results.
areas.gap: Follow-up areas the note itself flags — sub-quadratic attention, positional encoding advances, and training-stability scaling — have no notes yet.
